prestazioni: 1NZ-FE 1.5L naturally aspirated engine (or 2NZ-FE 1.3L for base models) forced induction via HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT-SS42 model, 0.63 A/R turbine housing, 550cc injectors) with custom 264° HKS camshafts and Tomei Type-S exhaust manifold for optimized spool and mid-range torque

Full Tomei Powered EXPREME Ti exhaust system (60mm diameter, titanium construction) paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo management on the 1NZ-FE

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (IST-specific valving, 20-way adjustable damping) with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow section) and Ultra Racing rear lower arm brace (3-point design) to eliminate chassis flex under hard cornering
estetica: Vertex Japan Edge widebody conversion kit (IST-specific, 30mm extended fenders front/rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a Veilside Fortune 03 rear bumper lip for aggressive stance
TRD Gen 2 17x8 +35 forged wheels (ET35 offset, 5x100 PCD) wrapped in Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (215/40/17) with custom 5mm spacers for flush fitment
Custom J's Racing rear wing (Type 3, 1200mm width, 3D carbon fiber) mounted on a Cusco aluminum wing riser kit (50mm height) with integrated LED third brake light
